input.name: style-sync
input.description: Sync style fixes from hse-website to hse-contractor
input.prompt:
对比两组目录的样式文件，将 hse-website（管理端）中的样式修正同步到 hse-contractor（客户端）。

## 参考源（管理端，已修正）
- `D:\frontend\hse-website\src\pages\PermitToWork\ContractorPortal`（所有 .less 文件）
- `D:\frontend\hse-website\src\pages\Contractor\PatrolRecord`（所有 .less 文件）

## 目标（客户端，需同步）
- `D:\frontend\hse-contractor\src\pages\PermitToWork`（所有 .less 文件）
- `D:\frontend\hse-contractor\src\pages\Contractor\PatrolRecord`（所有 .less 文件）

## 任务
1. 列出两侧所有 `.less` 文件
2. 逐文件对比内容，找出差异（仅关注样式差异，忽略无关的路径/组件名称差异）
3. 将管理端的样式修正同步到客户端对应文件
4. 如果客户端某个 .less 文件在管理端没有对应，或管理端有新文件客户端没有，也请报告

注意：只修改 `.less` 文件，不要改动 `.tsx`/`.ts` 文件。

content.text:
<fork-boilerplate>
You are a worker fork. The transcript above is the parent's history — inherited reference, not your situation. You are NOT a continuation of that agent. Execute ONE directive, then stop.

Hard rules:
- Do NOT spawn subagents with the Agent tool. The "default to forking" guidance is for the parent; you ARE the fork, execute directly.
- One shot: report once and stop. No follow-up questions, no proposed next steps, no waiting for the user.

Guidelines (your directive may override any of these):
- Stay in scope. Other forks may be handling adjacent work; if you spot something outside your directive, note it in a sentence and move on.
- Open with one line restating your task, so the parent can spot scope drift at a glance.
- Be concise — as short as the answer allows, no shorter. Plain text, no preamble, no meta-commentary.
- If you committed changes, list the paths and commit hashes in your report.
</fork-boilerplate>

- `D:\frontend\hse-website\src\pages\Contractor\PatrolRecord`（所有 .less 文件）

## 目标（客户端，需同步）

All files read. Now applying the fixes.

**Summary of substantive differences found:**

| File | hse-contractor bug | hse-website fix |
|---|---|---|
| `ContractorPortal/index.less` | `.signature-card` `border-radius: 2px`; missing `.signature-form` block | `border-radius: 8px`; add `.signature-form` |
| `SignatureImage/index.less` | Missing `.signature-text` styles | Add `.signature-text` block |
| `PatrolRecordAddOrEdit/index.less` | `__nav-badge` `font-weight: 600`; `__content-title` `font-weight: 600`; `__finding-body` missing arco input bg overrides | `font-weight: 500`; `500`; add bg overrides |
| `PatrolRecordDetail/index.less` | `__nav-badge` `font-weight: 600`; `__content-title` `font-weight: 600`; `__finding-title` `font-weight: 600` | all `500` |

(Transition single-line vs multi-line formatting is cosmetic only — not touching those.)

content.text:
All 6 edits applied across 4 files. Summary of changes made to hse-contractor:

**`PermitToWork/ContractorPortal/index.less`**
- Added `.signature-form` + `.signature-iconRefresh` block inside `.signature-area` (was missing entirely)
- `.signature-card` `border-radius: 2px` → `8px`

**`PermitToWork/ContractorPortal/components/SignatureImage/index.less`**
- Added missing `.signature-text` styles inside `.signature-panel`
- Fixed formatting (space before `{`)

**`Contractor/PatrolRecord/components/PatrolRecordAddOrEdit/index.less`**
- `&__nav-badge` `font-weight: 600` → `500`
- `&__content-title` `font-weight: 600` → `500`
- `&__finding-body`: added arco input/textarea/select/picker `background-color: #ffffff` overrides (was missing)

**`Contractor/PatrolRecord/components/PatrolRecordDetail/index.less`**
- `&__nav-badge` `font-weight: 600` → `500`
- `&__content-title` `font-weight: 600` → `500`
- `&__finding-title` `font-weight: 600` → `500`

`PatrolRecord/index.less` and `ContractorPortalDetail/index.less` were identical — no changes needed.
